void __thiscall CWvsContext::OnPacket(CWvsContext *this, CInPacket *a2)
{
  int op;
  op = CInPacket::Decode2(a2);
  switch ( op )
  {
    case 0xA0u:
      CWvsContext::OnStatChanged(this, a2);
      break;
    case 0xA1u:
      CWvsContext::OnInventoryOperation(this, a2);
      break;
    case 0xA2u:
      sub_A07B40(this, a2);
      break;
    default:
      break;
  }
}
